Let me check the wiki index and search the codebase for dependents of `lattice-source-parser`.Let me also check if any other packages reference it outside of `.toml` files.Let me check if `lattice-curator-core` has it as a dependency too, since it appeared in the context search.Only one package has `lattice-source-parser` as a declared dependency: **`lattice-graph-core`**.

It's listed in `packages/lattice-graph-core/pyproject.toml` both as a runtime dependency and as a workspace reference:
```
"lattice-source-parser",          # runtime dep
lattice-source-parser = { workspace = true }  # workspace resolver
```

`lattice-curator-core` references it in wiki/context docs but does not declare it as a package dependency — it uses `lattice-graph-core` as its interface instead.
